        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # cv_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # scout_plane1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = scout_plane1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { scout_plane1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_small_airframe - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # range_improvements - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { range_improvements = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # aircraft_construction - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { aircraft_construction = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) --

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1926 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # iw_medium_airframe - 1926
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_medium_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1926 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# advanced_decryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1937 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1937 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1943 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) --

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_air_y1943 = yes
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# engines_5
#   year=2055 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_anti_tank_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # photo_reconnaisance - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = photo_reconnaisance }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_artillery_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) --

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_infantry_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # paratroopers - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # marines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_mountaineers - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # rangers_tech - 1936

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            set_technology = { rangers_tech = 1 popup = no }

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_medium_tank_chassis - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1910 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1910 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1946 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_heavy - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_battlecruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_battleship - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ship_hull_super_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
        # basic_battleship - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (10 techs) --

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

                NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { improved_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (12 techs) --

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1944 = yes
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
